positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical graphic design illustration of a celestial woodland guardian (mix of deer, owl, and floral elements). The subject should be rendered in a single-line, etched, tribal-mandala style, featuring delicate bioluminescent accents and cosmic nebula patterns integrated into the fur and antlers. Composition must be centrally focused and framed like a spiritual crest or sigil. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal gold, and teal. The style should emulate intricate zentangle art combined with neo-tribal vector illustration. Isolated on a clean, solid cream background. Intricate line work, clean silhouette, high contrast, perfect symmetry, printable graphic art.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, watermark, signature, text, logo, low quality, grainy, jpeg artifacts, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, noisy, muted colors, photographic, realistic, NSFW
